overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game showing a rainy night walk through a neon-lit downtown plaza. The player moves through wet streets past pedestrians, holographic ground markers, and towering skyscrapers with bright advertisements, approaching an elevated transit track.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian plaza with holographic ground displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy plaza toward the blue holographic marker on the ground

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: towering futuristic buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and billboards
tall palm trees silhouetted against the neon-lit buildings
glowing blue square hologram projected on the wet pavement with Japanese characters
vertical neon signs and advertisements on building facades
curved elevated monorail or pedestrian bridge structure spanning the plaza
rain-slicked ground reflecting the neon lights and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk plaza during a rainy night, with towering neon skyscrapers surrounding the area. The camera moves forward toward a glowing blue holographic marker on the wet reflective pavement, while pedestrians in blue jackets walk through the scene. Palm trees and an elevated transit track are visible in the distance against the hazy neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach to elevated transit track

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward, adjusting path around the holographic marker

agents.ego_description: continuing forward with a slight rightward trajectory, moving past the blue holographic marker

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'Embers' on the facade of a distant building
modern glass facade building with vertical structural lines on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking with a slight rightward turn, moving past the blue holographic marker which falls behind. The elevated transit track becomes more prominent in the mid-ground, and an illuminated 'Embers' sign becomes visible on a distant building. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the elevated monorail track and palm trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching closer to the palm trees and elevated transit track, which now dominate the center of the frame. The 'Embers' sign moves closer into mid-ground view while the surrounding neon skyscrapers maintain their presence in the background. The rain continues to fall on the reflective pavement as the walk progresses toward the transit structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rainy cyberpunk plaza that gradually shifts focus from the wide neon cityscape toward a specific elevated transit structure. It begins by advancing across wet, reflective pavement toward a glowing blue holographic marker, with pedestrians in blue jackets passing by under the gaze of towering skyscrapers. As the camera moves past the marker with a slight rightward turn, the perspective opens up to reveal an illuminated Embers sign on a distant building while the elevated transit track becomes more prominent in the mid-ground. The scene then narrows its focus as the camera approaches the palm trees and the transit track, which grow to dominate the center of the frame. Finally, the walk progresses deeper into the hazy neon glow, bringing the Embers sign into closer view against the backdrop of the rain-slicked city.
